title: Miss Tatlock's Millions
writer: Charles Brackett, Richard L. Breen, Jacques Deval
actors: John Lund, Wanda Hendrix, Barry Fitzgerald
plot: After an idiot heir's accidental death, a stuntman is hired to impersonate him when the family gathers to determine the disbursement of Miss Tatlock's fortune. But complications soon line up to stand between a lucky lookalike and ...
